_comment_github: provider=github uses the gh CLI (run `gh auth login` once). Repos are owner/repo. me is resolved from gh if left empty.
_comment_azure: For provider=azure instead, set these (repos are just the repo name) and run `az login`.
_comment_watchmine: Set watchMine to true to auto-watch every open PR you authored across all repos (no manual adding). watchMineMaxAgeDays skips PRs older than N days so stale experiments don't clutter the board (0 = no limit). Manual adds are never filtered.
_comment_watchreviews: Set watchReviewRequests to true to auto-watch every open PR waiting on your review. Each shows a 'review requested' card and clears once you've reviewed it. Works on both providers (Azure lists within your configured project).
_comment_approvals: Set both to your own team's policy — the 1/2 here is just an example. approvalsRequired = how many approvals make a PR count as mergeable (the green bar). approvalsPreferred = a soft target that fires the one-off 'ready to merge' nudge. They are independent knobs.
_comment_notify: Desktop notifications are automatic per-OS. For an optional phone push, set an ntfy topic (a long private string) and subscribe the ntfy app to it.
